connections.gloss: broad place (way), street. See also H1050 (בֵּית רְחוֹב).
abroad, field, forth, highway, more, out(-side, -ward), street, without.

connections.def: feminine of 4116; a wide "plat" or "place", i.e. open square:--street. see GREEK for
prolongation from 4506 in its original sense; an alley or avenue (as crowded):--lane, street. see GREEK for
